docs: finalize opentelemetry observability feature documentation

- Add ADR-053 decision record comparing OpenTelemetry vs Pino
- Add design documentation with architecture diagrams and component boundaries
- Add comprehensive requirements and acceptance criteria
- Add JTBD analysis with job stories and four forces framework
- Add detailed UX journey maps and visual design documentation
